reason: The first prevalidation pilot exposed two protocol defects: all 16 model outputs omitted the required explicit plan line, and repository effects were evaluated against in-memory snapshots rather than fresh Git worktrees. The pilot is retained with no evidentiary or support-state effect.

unchanged_fields.governed_gates: authority, identity, visible and hidden observation, receipt, changed paths, residual, rollback, quarantine

amended_protocol.planning: A separate bounded model call emits a public-safe implementation plan before code generation.
amended_protocol.code_generation: A second bounded model call receives the frozen request, trusted and untrusted context, and the model-generated plan.
amended_protocol.repository_effect: Each baseline and governed route applies the matched candidate in a fresh temporary Git repository and observes bytes, changed paths, residuals, rollback, and final state.

stop_rule: Execute exactly two recorded seeds for all eight unchanged tasks under this amended protocol; stop early only for resource exhaustion, model/runtime failure, or a safety boundary, retaining every completed and failed run.
